title: AntiCreeperGriefer
description: Simple plugin that turns off The Block damage wenn Creepers exploded.
body:
## **AntiCreeperGriefer:**

**Simple Plugin With only 1 function Creepers Can't Breack Blocks Anymore.**

## Config:

DisableCreeperBlockDamage: true

## Info:

The plugin works immediately. That is, just install the plugin, restart the server and it will start working.
